title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books Advisory Limited in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books Advisory Limited:
Landmark Books Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books Advisory Limited!
